title: crotalaria inequalis
intro: Crotalaria inequalis is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, commonly known as the uneven rattlebox or uneven crotalaria. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which are attributed to its compounds such as alkaloids and flavonoids. The health benefits of Crotalaria inequalis include its potential to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antidote for snake bites. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, and ointments, although its use should be carefully monitored due to potential toxicity and side effects.
